what_was_done: Both approved improvements implemented: (1) Auto tier classification — _classify_tier() Tier 1/2/3, metadata in remember_this, _apply_tier_boost in search, _backfill_tiers for existing memories, 12 tests. (2) Embedding upgrade — thenlper/gte-base (768-dim, 512 tokens) replacing default MiniLM (384-dim, 256 tokens), SentenceTransformerEmbeddingFunction on all 5 collections, _migrate_embeddings() for re-embedding, backup_embeddings.py script (52MB backup at ~/data/memory/). Alibaba-NLP/gte-multilingual-base broken with sentence-transformers v5.2.3, substituted thenlper/gte-base. 5 embedding tests. Tests: 1291 → 1308 (+17), 0 failures.
